title: Ben 10 | Omnicraft - Alien Evolution & Omnitrix RPG
description: Craft the Omnitrix & transform into Ben 10 Aliens | Play the #1 Ben 10 Modpack
body:
[![Apex Hosting Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/daff759a836c21c16cb4f3bc016193c365ba13d1_0.webp)](https://apexhost.gg/Ben10) **The Official Omnicraft Modpack**
   ![Divider](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1221978/description_94b640fd-a096-4ef2-a465-e606a981b815.png) ![Divider](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1221978/description_94b640fd-a096-4ef2-a465-e606a981b815.png)
🟢 **Become the Hero** — Craft the Omnitrix and transform into fully animated Aliens using Alien Evolution. Level up, unlock new forms, and master your abilities. 🟢 **Multiplayer Ready** — Built for servers! Team up with friends to defeat bosses or fight each other in alien duels. Use the Apex Hosting link to start your own server in seconds. 🟢 **Advanced Technology** — Automate your world. Build intricate factories with **Create** or harness nuclear power and heavy machinery with **Mekanism**. 🟢 **Sorcery & Spells** — Not just aliens! Become a legendary wizard with **Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks**. Craft unique spell books and cast powerful magic. 🟢 **Cinematic Combat** — Experience battles in a whole new way with Shoulder Surfing (3rd Person) and improved animations. Fighting as Four Arms has never felt this heavy. 🟢 **Galactic Travel** — Don't stop at the Overworld. Build rockets and travel to the Moon, Mars, and beyond with **Ad Astra**. 🟢 **Alive World** — Explore a completely overhauled world featuring Biomes O' Plenty and the stunning depths of **Alex's Caves**. 🟢 **Structure Overhaul** — Explore the world like never before with the entire **YUNG's Suite** (Better Dungeons, Mineshafts, Strongholds) and **Integrated Dungeons Arise**. 🟢 **Brutal Bosses** — Test your alien powers against the toughest foes in Minecraft from **L_Ender's Cataclysm** and **Mowzie's Mobs**. 🟢 **Quality of Life** — Includes Xaero's Minimap, Sophisticated Backpacks, and Waystones. ![Divider](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1221978/description_94b640fd-a096-4ef2-a465-e606a981b815.png)
